findings.summary: CoffeeRoaster LCD4x20 (17 components). All zero signal detections confirmed correct — design is Arduino Nano + PCF8574 I2C expander + LCD + 2x MAX31855 thermocouple ICs + switches/connectors. No passive filter/divider networks present. Minor: I2C bus and thermocouple sensor interface not characterized.

correct.description: Zero voltage dividers, RC filters, LC filters, feedback networks, crystal circuits, transistor circuits all confirmed correct — no passive networks present
17 total components correctly counted, BOM values verified
Power rails correctly not reported — design uses Arduino Nano onboard regulators
